STACS Logo [...] ## Compare HydraX to Competitors

TytoCare Logo

TytoCare offers remote healthcare technology that enables physical exams to be conducted from home. It offers products that support primary and urgent care, and condition management, using Artificial Intelligence (AI) and data-driven insights. It serves the healthcare sector, including health systems, health plans, and community health organizations. It was founded in 2011 and is based in Netanya, Israel.

BrightInsight Logo [...] Very Good Security Logo

Very Good Security specializes in payment tokenization and operates within the financial technology sector. The company offers services including a card management platform, network tokens, an account updater, and card attributes. It primarily serves sectors such as e-commerce, financial institutions, and the gaming industry, among others. It was founded in 2015 and is based in San Francisco, California.

Immuta Logo

Immuta operates in the technology sector, providing services related to data security and governance. Its platform includes data security, governance, and continuous monitoring to manage sensitive data across data ecosystems. It was founded in 2015 and is based in College Park, Maryland.

results.title: Hydra-X: Native Unified Multimodal Models with Holistic Visual Tokenizers
results.content:
Hydra-XTok is the strongest unified tokenizer on every video metric: it improves over the previous best AToken-So/C by +1.59+1.59 dB DAVIS PSNR and +2.22+2.22 dB UCF PSNR, while more than halving rFVD on both datasets (11.6111.61 vs. 29.1929.19 on DAVIS; 3.113.11 vs. 7.777.77 on UCF). On video benchmarks, Hydra-XTok also outperforms the dedicated 16×16\times video VAE Wan 2.2 (+0.55+0.55 dB DAVIS PSNR, +0.77+0.77 dB UCF PSNR; rFVD reduced by 21%21\% and 25%25\% respectively), suggesting that a single holistic ViT with hierarchical patchify is a competitive alternative to cascaded image++video designs. [...] We compare two variants of Hydra-X that differ only in this routing step: Hydra-X-Indep encodes the source and target through two independent Sem-ViT branches—the conventional pipeline shared by BAGEL, OmniGen2, and similar systems—while Hydra-X-STI routes the pair through a single shared Sem-ViT with tubelet causal attention, treating (𝐱c,𝐱t)(\mathbf{x}\_{c},\mathbf{x}\_{t}) as a length-22 clip. Both variants share the same Gen-ViT, the same LLM, and the same flow-matching head, with identical parameter count and training schedule. [...] Unified Multimodal Models

results.title: Hydra X Asset Profile | Preqin
results.content:
Primary Industry

Financial Services

About

Based in Singapore, and established in 2018, Hydra X is a financial technology company that provides digital marketplace infrastructure for the tokenization capital markets.
Hydra X provides financial services including token management solutions, token exchange solutions, multi-asset order management solutions, and digital self-custody solutions. The token management includes token issuance, minting, burning, and suspension of tokens. And token exchange includes trading front end, middle and back office, matching engine, OTC engine, and pricing engine.

Those services enable interoperability between traditional and digital assets. [...] Have updates for this profile? Please contribute data

## Hydra Series Airless Sprayer Replacement Parts

The Hydra Series Sprayer Parts collection includes essential replacement components designed for the reliable performance of SPEEFLO and Hydra airless sprayer models such as the Hydra Pro IV, Hydra M2000, Hydra M4000, and Hydra X (4540/7230). Engineered to meet the demanding needs of contractors and industrial users, these parts ensure smooth operation, consistent spray pressure, and long-term durability for both gas-powered and electric Hydra sprayer units. [...] Whether you’re maintaining your sprayer for peak efficiency or performing a complete rebuild, Hydra Series replacement parts offer OEM-grade precision and compatibility for maximum sprayer life and minimal downtime.

## Key Features

### OEM-Quality Components

All parts are built to original equipment specifications for perfect fit, optimal performance, and reliable operation.

### Designed for Heavy-Duty Use

Made to withstand the high pressures and continuous workloads typical in professional spraying environments.

### Compatible with Multiple Hydra Models

Covers a range of sprayers, including Pro IV Gas Sprayers, M2000, M4000, and Hydra X units.

### Improved Sprayer Efficiency
